subject: [PATCH v3 12/16] userfaultfd: add UFFDIO_SET_MODE for runtime sync/async toggle

2026-05-22.patch_summary: This patch adds a new ioctl called UFFDIO_SET_MODE that allows a VMM to toggle between sync and async read-write-protect (RWP) modes at runtime without re-registering the userfaultfd. The ioctl takes an enable/disable bitmask of UFFD_FEATURE_* flags, with only RWP_ASYNC being toggleable today. When switching to async mode, pending sync waiters are woken so they retry and auto-resolve under the new mode. This allows for dynamic switching between sync and async modes, which is useful for scenarios like working set scanning and page eviction.
